jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at TechSaksham
jsonLd.description:
TechSaksham invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!
